acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A verified approved draft PR is promoted exactly once before merge
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: A dedicated readiness coordinator runs before the only merge-capable deployment-verifier role.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Restart after remote acceptance but before receipt recovers without duplicate mutation
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The response-loss recovery test reuses one deterministic operation ID and observes one provider mutation.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A stale HEAD blocks without promoting or merging
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The stale-HEAD test returns a bounded rejection and confirms the deployment-verifier never starts.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: The complete PR lifecycle reaches merge through bos-mcp only
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The readiness role is restricted to bos_mark_pull_request_ready and merge remains policy-checked through bos-mcp.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Complete Symphony tests and recovery gates pass
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: mix test and make all passed on the exact commit.

checks.name: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test
cd elixir && make all
checks.summary: Formatting, specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer passed.

summary: Post-approval delivery now idempotently promotes the exact AgentRun draft PR and confirms open, non-draft, exact-HEAD state before policy merge.
